title: Whats your favourite Eva character
wikitext:
[]: What's your favourite Eva character?             Quote Post by Xxx_Generic Name_Xxx » Wed Jul 13, 2016 1:02 pm Mine's Asuka because I felled that she was the most relatable (and I have the same personalityand hungry for attention as her) and the most developed of the bunch.

[]: Re: What's your favourite Eva character?             Quote Post by ErgoProxy » Wed Jul 13, 2016 1:09 pm They gonna shut you down for those topics... : D Rebuild Ramiel for obvious reasons. A frelled, four-dimensional Death Star alive and screaming.

[]: Re: What's your favourite Eva character?             Quote Post by Xxx_Generic Name_Xxx » Wed Jul 13, 2016 1:12 pm [quote="ErgoProxy#840454"]They gonna shut you down for those topics... : D Wait, why?

[]: Re: What's your favourite Eva character?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jul 13, 2016 1:13 pm We already have a twenty-six page thread on this exact subject . You are encouraged to use existing threads rather than start new identical ones which tend to duplicate the same discussions or make it harder to find all related arguments together. There's also a thread for your least favourite character .
